overall.description: A cinematic aerial glide through Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a narrow neon-lit urban canyon and opening up to reveal flying vehicles and the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at dusk. The camera smoothly navigates between futuristic skyscrapers adorned with holographic billboards and neon signage.

agents.ego_description: smoothly gliding forward through the urban canyon, observing the neon-lit architecture

entered.detail: metal walkway structure spanning between buildings with illuminated advertising screens
tall brutalist building with distinctive vertical red neon stripes
modern high-rise with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows
multi-level highway interchange with moving traffic visible below
illuminated advertising displays mounted on the overhead bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow urban canyon between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. An overhead pedestrian bridge with glowing billboards spans the gap above, while a distinctive red-striped building dominates the left side. The camera moves smoothly forward at elevated height, revealing the multi-level highway system below.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza overlook with tiered commercial structures

events.description: camera pans right revealing the open city plaza and the massive Corpo headquarters tower in the distance
camera continues turning right, shifting focus from left-side buildings to the central skyline and right-side commercial complex

agents.ego_description: panning right to survey the expansive cityscape, maintaining smooth forward momentum

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle enters the frame from the right, moving across the skyline

entered.detail: massive corporate headquarters with illuminated signage and tiered architecture
stepped building facade with multiple levels of neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: As the camera turns right, the narrow canyon opens into a wider urban vista. The Corpo Plaza tower rises prominently in the center distance, while a tiered commercial building with cascading neon signs fills the right side. The red-striped skyscraper recedes into the left background as the perspective shifts to reveal more of the city's vertical architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: panoramic city overlook with aerial traffic corridors

events.description: multiple flying vehicles enter the frame, moving across the skyline between buildings
moon becomes visible in the darkening sky as natural light fades further

agents.ego_description: observing the aerial traffic and expansive cityscape while completing the rightward pan

notable_agents.action: flying car with illuminated thrusters moving from right to left across the frame

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicles with glowing thrusters moving through the city sky
bright moon visible in the dark blue evening sky between clouds
expansive view of the city extending to the horizon with scattered lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City as the camera completes its rightward turn. Flying vehicles traverse the sky between skyscrapers, their thrusters glowing against the darkening blue hour sky. The moon hangs visible above the distant Corpo Plaza tower, while the city lights stretch endlessly toward the horizon, showcasing the vast scale of the cyberpunk metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that begins within a claustrophobic urban canyon and gradually expands into a breathtaking panoramic vista of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by moving forward between towering skyscrapers, passing beneath a glowing pedestrian bridge and beside a distinctive red-striped building while revealing a multi-level highway system below. As the camera turns right, the narrow corridor opens into a wider urban expanse where the red-striped tower recedes to make room for a tiered commercial building adorned with cascading neon signs. The perspective then shifts further to reveal the prominent Corpo Plaza tower rising in the center distance against a darkening blue hour sky. Finally, the scene expands into a vast horizon where flying vehicles with glowing thrusters traverse the air beneath a visible moon, showcasing the endless scale of the city lights.
